# automaticstay.org

> Plain-English guide to the automatic stay under 11 U.S.C. Section 362. Learn what it stops, how long it lasts, repeat filer limits, creditor violations, and motions for relief from stay.

## About

automaticstay.org provides a comprehensive guide to the automatic stay, the immediate legal protection that takes effect the moment a bankruptcy case is filed under 11 U.S.C. Section 362. The site covers what actions the stay prohibits (foreclosure, repossession, wage garnishment, lawsuits, utility shutoffs), repeat filer limitations under Sections 362(c)(3) and 362(c)(4), creditor violation remedies under Section 362(k), and motions for relief from stay. Available in both English and Spanish.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://automaticstay.org/): Overview of the automatic stay -- your shield against creditors
- [What It Covers](https://automaticstay.org/what-it-covers.html): Lawsuits, garnishments, foreclosures, repossessions, collection calls, utility shutoffs -- organized by creditor type
- [Violations](https://automaticstay.org/violations.html): When creditors violate the stay -- 362(k) damages, what to do, common violations
- [Exceptions](https://automaticstay.org/exceptions.html): Criminal proceedings, domestic support, tax audits, certain evictions, police power
- [Repeat Filer Limits](https://automaticstay.org/serial-filer-limits.html): 362(c)(3) 30-day stay, 362(c)(4) no stay, BAPCPA 2005 changes
- [Motion for Relief](https://automaticstay.org/motion-for-relief.html): When creditors ask to lift the stay -- grounds, hearing, how to oppose
- [How Long Does It Last](https://automaticstay.org/how-long-does-it-last.html): Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13 duration, discharge injunction, dismissal
- [Spanish Version](https://automaticstay.org/index-es.html): Guide in Spanish (La suspension automatica)

## Network

Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network (https://1328f.org). Free, open-source bankruptcy information.

## Citation

When referencing, cite as: "automaticstay.org, Bankruptcy Transparency Network (2026)."
